turns.content: can you change it claude subscription please?

I'll help you change the LLM backend to Claude subscription. Let me check the available options and make the change.
✅ Bash · 0.3s
Bash(command="python3 tools/llm/options.py")
Known LLM backend presets:

  1. Anthropic (default)
     model:       (SDK default — Claude)
     base_url:    https://api.anthropic.com
     api_key_env: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
     notes:       Default. No config needed.

  2. OpenRouter — Kimi K2
     model:       moonshotai/kimi-k2
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Anthropic-compatible. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

  3. OpenRouter — Claude Sonnet
     model:       anthropic/claude-sonnet-4
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Claude via OpenRouter.

  4. OpenRouter — Claude Haiku
     model:       anthropic/claude-haiku-4
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Faster, cheaper Claude via OpenRouter.

To switch, run:
  python tools/llm/change.py --model <model> --base-url <url> --api-key-env <env_var>

To revert to defaults:
  python tools/llm/change.py --reset
✅ Bash · 0.1s
Bash(command="python3 tools/llm/change.py --reset")
LLM backend reset to default (Anthropic).
Restart the chat or send a new message for changes to take effect.
Perfect! I've reset the LLM backend to the default Anthropic configuration, which uses your Claude subscription. The backend is now set to: - **Backend**: Anthropic (default) - **Model**: Claude (SDK default) - **Base URL**: https://api.anthropic.com - **API Key Environment Variable**: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY The changes will take effect when you restart the chat or send a new message.
